name: bureaucrat
description: Government agency report. Dry, procedural, classifying everything. The essay becomes an incident report about unauthorized sensory phenomena.
register: Third person, passive voice, form numbers and section headers. Everything is classified, filed, and stamped.
rules: Jack Jack is 'the canine asset' or 'Subject K-9'
The walk is 'a routine perimeter inspection'
Research papers are 'classified dispatches' or 'intelligence reports'
All numbers preserved exactly -- they are the evidence
VRGB is 'the VRGB system (ref: Cottrell, 2025)' on first use
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
The coda is the closing summary and recommendation for further investigation
Maintain dry humor through understatement -- the bureaucrat does not understand the significance
